feeds.title: 药物 · 临床试验
feeds.term: (lecanemab OR donanemab OR "anti-amyloid" OR "tau-targeting" OR trontinemab) AND ("clinical trial"[Publication Type] OR phase OR efficacy)

feeds.title: 机制 · 基础研究
feeds.term: ("Alzheimer Disease"[Mesh]) AND (amyloid OR tau OR neuroinflammation OR APOE OR microglia) AND (mechanism OR pathology OR pathogenesis)

feeds.title: 诊断 · 生物标志物
feeds.term: (Alzheimer) AND ("p-tau217" OR "plasma biomarker" OR "blood biomarker" OR "amyloid PET" OR "GFAP") AND (diagnosis OR detection OR screening)

feeds.title: 预防 · 生活方式
feeds.term: (Alzheimer OR dementia) AND (prevention OR diet OR exercise OR "cognitive reserve" OR lifestyle OR "physical activity") AND (cohort OR "risk factor" OR longitudinal)

feeds.title: 新手村 · 入门综述
feeds.term: ("Alzheimer Disease"[Mesh]) AND ("Review"[Publication Type]) AND (overview OR introduction OR "current understanding" OR primer OR basics)

drug.title: Tau-mediated Mechanisms in Alzheimer's Disease Pathogenesis.
drug.zh: Tau蛋白介导的神经退行性机制是阿尔茨海默病发病的核心，靶向Aβ疗法疗效有限促使研究焦点转向Tau。

drug.title: Anti-amyloid nanobody-Fc fusion protein drives potent amyloid clearance through microglial recruitment.
drug.zh: 抗淀粉样蛋白纳米抗体-Fc融合蛋白通过招募小胶质细胞实现高效清除淀粉样斑块。

drug.title: Statistical inference for saved time based on disease progression curves in Alzheimer's disease research.
drug.zh: 基于疾病进展曲线面积推导出节省时间的闭合方差公式，解决了阿尔茨海默病疗效评估的统计推断难题。

drug.title: Comparative risk of amyloid-related imaging abnormalities with anti-amyloid-β monoclonal antibodies: A systematic review and penalized likelihood network meta-analysis of randomized trials.
drug.zh: 抗淀粉样蛋白单抗治疗阿尔茨海默病时，ApoE4携带者ARIA-E风险显著高于非携带者，且不同药物风险差异明显。

drug.title: Suboptimal adherence to brain health recommendations in patients pursuing anti-amyloid antibody therapy for Alzheimer's disease: Report from the Brain Health Vital Signs project.
drug.journal: The journal of prevention of Alzheimer's
drug.zh: 接受抗淀粉样蛋白治疗的早期阿尔茨海默病患者对脑健康建议的依从性普遍不足。

drug.title: UPLC-ESI-qTOF-MS metabolomic characterization and in vivo neuroprotective activity of Diplotaxis harra ethanolic extract through antioxidant, anti-cholinesterase, and anti-amyloid mechanisms.
drug.zh: Diplotaxis harra提取物通过抗氧化、抗胆碱酯酶和抗淀粉样蛋白机制，在阿尔茨海默病大鼠模型中改善认知并逆转多靶点病理。

drug.title: Efficacy, safety and policy implications of anti-amyloid monoclonal antibodies for Alzheimer's disease: protocol for a living systematic review and meta-analysis.
drug.zh: 抗淀粉样蛋白单抗治疗阿尔茨海默病的疗效与安全性需持续更新系统评价来指导临床与政策。

drug.title: Optimal control for anti-abeta treatment in Alzheimer's disease using a reaction-diffusion model.
drug.journal: Journal of the Royal Society, Interface
drug.zh: 基于反应-扩散模型的最优控制策略可个性化抗Aβ治疗，平衡疗效与ARIA风险。

mech.title: Delta-9-tetrahydrocannabinol delineates D-galactose and aluminium chloride-induced cognitive dysfunction and neurodegeneration in the hippocampus of the Wistar rat model.
mech.zh: Δ9-四氢大麻酚可逆转D-半乳糖与氯化铝诱导的大鼠认知障碍及海马神经退行性变。

mech.title: Deep learning-based MRI analysis reveals Lewy body co-pathology accelerates brain aging in Alzheimer's disease.
mech.zh: 深度学习MRI分析揭示路易体共病理加速阿尔茨海默病患者的脑老化进程。

mech.title: KetoFLEX 12/3 Diet and Cognitive Health: A Precision-Nutrition Perspective on Mechanisms, Emerging Evidence, and Future Directions.
mech.zh: KetoFLEX 12/3饮食通过轻度生酮、限时进食与个性化代谢优化，靶向阿尔茨海默病多重病理机制。

mech.title: Neuroprotective Effects of Sorghum Polyphenol in Alzheimer's Disease: In Vitro and In Silico Analyses.
mech.zh: 高粱多酚在体外和计算机模拟中通过抑制Aβ42毒性、保护线粒体功能发挥抗阿尔茨海默病神经保护作用。

mech.title: Peripheral and Central miRNA Signatures in Alzheimer's Disease: Tissue-Specific Variability, Sex-Associated Differences, and Implications for Blood-Based Biomarkers.
mech.zh: 外周与中枢miRNA在阿尔茨海默病中呈现组织特异性和性别差异，挑战其作为血液生物标志物的可靠性。

mech.title: Salivary Biomarkers in Alzheimer's Disease: Emerging Diagnostic Tools and Their Association with Periodontal Disease.
mech.zh: 唾液生物标志物作为阿尔茨海默病无创诊断工具，与牙周病存在关联。

mech.title: Presenilin-1 Affects Melanoma Cell Behavior in an Amyloid Precursor Protein-Rich, Alzheimer's Disease-like, Microenvironment.
mech.zh: PS-1通过切割APP产生Aβ，在AD样微环境中抑制黑色素瘤细胞生长。

mech.title: LRP1 and RAGE Expression in the Frontal Cortex in the Alzheimer's Disease Ischemia Model During 2 Years of Follow-Up.
mech.zh: 阿尔茨海默病缺血模型中，额叶皮层LRP1表达随时间双向波动，RAGE持续上调。

dx.title: Establishment and Characterization of an Aβ-Related Alzheimer's Disease-like Tree Shrew Model Following CA1-Coordinate-Directed Stereotaxic AAV Delivery of Human Triple-Mutant APP.
dx.zh: 通过CA1区立体定向注射AAV递送人三突变APP成功构建了树鼩Aβ相关阿尔茨海默病样模型。

dx.title: The Centiloid Scale in Amyloid PET Imaging: Current Role in Alzheimer's Disease Diagnosis, Treatment Planning, and Monitoring During Anti-Amyloid Therapy: A Clinical Perspective.
dx.zh: Centiloid标准化量表为淀粉样蛋白PET在阿尔茨海默病诊断、抗淀粉样蛋白治疗筛选及疗效监测中提供了关键量化阈值。

dx.title: Structural MRI across lifespan reveals differential thalamic trajectories in Down syndrome.
dx.zh: 唐氏综合征患者丘脑体积随年龄加速萎缩，与阿尔茨海默病血浆标志物升高显著相关。

dx.title: Glial molecular signatures as a liquid biopsy marker in Alzheimer's disease diagnosis.
dx.zh: 胶质细胞分子特征可作为阿尔茨海默病液体活检新标志物，优于传统蛋白指标。

dx.title: Performance of Alzheimer Disease Plasma Biomarkers in Patients With Prion Diseases.
dx.zh: 血浆p-tau217等AD生物标志物在朊病毒病患者中显著升高，无法可靠区分阿尔茨海默病与朊病毒病。

dx.title: Amyloid PET Quantitation and Centiloid Thresholds in the Diagnosis of Alzheimer Disease: An Individual Participant Data Meta-Analysis.
dx.zh: 基于个体数据荟萃分析，确立了不同方法下诊断阿尔茨海默病的淀粉样蛋白PET Centiloid阈值。

dx.title: Plasma Phosphorylated Tau 217 in Participants at Risk for Chronic Traumatic Encephalopathy.
dx.zh: 血浆p-tau217在慢性创伤性脑病风险人群中主要反映β-淀粉样蛋白病理，而非CTE特异性tau蛋白病变。

dx.title: A probabilistic framework for clinicopathological Alzheimer's disease using tau-PET.
dx.zh: 基于tau-PET构建概率框架，量化其对阿尔茨海默病临床病理诊断的预测价值。

prev.title: Pharmacogenetic analyses in people with dementia in Northeast Germany.
prev.zh: 德国痴呆队列中93%携带可干预药物基因组变异，12%需紧急调整用药。

prev.title: Deep Model Families for EEG-Based Multi-Class Dementia Classification.
prev.zh: 基于无泄漏评估，四种深度学习模型家族对阿尔茨海默病、额颞叶痴呆与健康对照的多分类效能相当。

prev.title: Steroid hormones in Alzheimer's disease: a molecular analysis of blood and cerebrospinal fluid.
prev.zh: 阿尔茨海默病女性患者脑脊液与血浆中九种甾体激素谱异常，且与认知衰退阶段相关。

prev.title: Risk of epilepsy in people with adult-onset hydrocephalus: insights from the UK Biobank.
prev.zh: 成人起病脑积水患者远期癫痫风险显著升高，独立于血管及遗传因素。

prev.title: Adherence to the MIND Diet and Longitudinal Changes in Global Cognition: A Post-Hoc Analysis of the MIND Trial.
prev.journal: The American journal of clinical nutriti
prev.zh: MIND饮食依从性高者认知下降更慢，但随机分组未显示显著差异。

prev.title: Mental health, biological aging, and lifestyle mediate the associations between social determinants of health and dementia.
prev.zh: 社会健康决定因素通过心理健康、生物衰老和生活方式间接影响痴呆风险。

prev.title: Hypertension, internet use, physical activity, and dementia risk in older adults: A multinational prospective cohort study across 31 countries.
prev.zh: 高血压、互联网使用和体力活动通过直接与间接路径共同影响老年人痴呆风险，其中体力活动与互联网使用可部分中介高血压与痴呆的关联。

prev.title: Higher physical activity levels mitigate synaptic protein loss and cognitive deterioration in aging and in Alzheimer's disease: a 10-year longitudinal study.
prev.zh: 十年纵向研究证实，较高体力活动水平可减缓衰老及阿尔茨海默病中的突触蛋白丢失与认知衰退。

intro.title: Peripheral and Central miRNA Signatures in Alzheimer's Disease: Tissue-Specific Variability, Sex-Associated Differences, and Implications for Blood-Based Biomarkers.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是科学家发现血液和大脑里的小分子能帮助更早发现阿尔茨海默病，但男女和不同身体部位的结果有差异，提醒大家别盲目相信单一检测。

intro.title: Analysis of the Efficacy of Acetylcholinesterase Inhibitors in the Treatment of Alzheimer's Disease, Literature Review.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是治疗阿尔茨海默病的一类常用药到底有没有用，能帮你判断医生开的药是否值得吃。

intro.title: Metabolic reprogramming in Alzheimer's disease: Interaction between receptor tyrosine kinase signaling, noncoding RNAs, and Neuron-Glia energy networks.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是阿尔茨海默病其实是大脑“没电了”，帮普通人看懂为啥脑子转不动、怎么从吃饭和习惯上提前预防。

intro.title: Osteoimmuno-brain axis: a bridge connecting osteoporosis and cognitive decline and its clinical significance in dementia and Alzheimer's disease.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是骨骼和大脑如何通过免疫系统互相影响，帮普通人理解为什么防骨质疏松可能也有助于预防老年痴呆。

intro.title: Advances in the Core Role and Mechanisms of Mitochondrial Dysfunction in Alzheimer's Disease.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑里的“能量小工厂”坏了会加速老年痴呆，看懂它就能明白为啥保护脑子要从保护细胞能量入手。

intro.title: Chemokines in Alzheimer's Disease: Early Defence, Late Damage and the Impact of Sex and Infection.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑里一种叫“化学信使”的小分子，在老年痴呆早期保护大脑、晚期却帮倒忙，还受性别和感染影响，帮你理解为啥有人病得更重。

intro.title: [Research progress on role of PINK1/Parkin-mediated mitophagy in Alzheimer's disease and TCM interventions].
intro.journal: Zhongguo Zhong yao za zhi = Zhongguo zho
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是细胞里一种清理垃圾的机制（PINK1/Parkin）出问题会加速老年痴呆，还介绍了中药怎么帮忙修复这个机制，帮普通人理解预防新思路。

intro.title: Calibrating microglia states in Alzheimer's disease: decoding immune-metabolic networks and nano-targeted multicomponent therapies.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑里一种叫“小胶质细胞”的清洁工在老年痴呆中如何失控，以及未来可能用更精准的多种药物组合来修复它，帮普通人理解治疗新方向。
